allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''d:\\Part Time\\amazones\\amazones'' -Filter ''*.html'' -Recurse | ForEach-Object { \(Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw\) -replace ''flex flex-row justify-between w-full items-center flex-wrap gap-20px'', ''flex flex-col w-full gap-20px'' | Set-Content $_.FullName -NoNewline }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''d:\\Part Time\\amazones\\amazones'' -Filter ''*.html'' -Recurse | ForEach-Object { $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($_.FullName\); $newContent = $content -replace ''flex flex-row justify-between w-full items-center flex-wrap gap-20px'', ''flex flex-col w-full gap-20px''; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($_.FullName, $newContent\) }")
